content_body: Dear Owners, thank you so much for the most beautiful cabin, view, and weekend ever! This was the best weekend I have had in the longest time. We three decided to have a Mother's and Daughter's weekend with no husband and no children. It was so very relaxing from our every-day busy lives. Everything about your home and view is absolutely beautiful. I will be recommending this place to all our friends and family. There is no way you could spend the week or any day here without total enjoyment. Thank you so much for sharing!
title: The Best Weekend We've Had In A Long Time
